case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. DRILL TECH DRILLING AND SHORING INC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT DRILL TECH DRILLING AND SHORING INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
